inputs.label: Effective Annual Rate
inputs.businessContext: The effective annual interest rate that incorporates the effect of compounding, expressed as a percentage.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly). Use 0 for continuous compounding when isContinuous is set to 1.

inputs.label: Continuous Compounding
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 if compounding is continuous, otherwise 0 for discrete compounding.
